programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts S1 - "Stalin's Atomic Bunker"
programme.desc: Infamous for the bunkers constructed during World War II and throughout the Cold War, Stalin’s hideouts have maintained a shroud of secrecy for decades, and are now seen for the first time.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts S1 - "Yanukovych's Hidden Palace"
programme.desc: Having stolen billions from the populace, Ukrainian dictator Viktor Yanukovych hides his treasure trove in a mind-bending corruption scheme that leads to Mezhyhirya, a 150-acre estate, with secret underground tunnels.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts S1 - "Ceausescu's Delusions of Grandeur"
programme.desc: Casa Poporlui is the magnum opus of Romania’s most bloodthirsty dictator, Nicolae Ceausescu, and hides secrets of an extensive underground bunker system.

programme.title: Dictators' Hideouts S1 - "The Best Of"
programme.desc: Travel across the continent, exploring the opulent villas, luxurious palaces, remote command centers, underground tunnels, and secret bunkers of Europe’s most tyrannical dictators.

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture S1 - "Parks and Gardens: Paradise Created by Humans"
programme.sub-title: Parks and Gardens: Paradise Created by Humans
programme.desc: Buildings with eccentric and unorthodox designs often have methods behind their madness, and serve to remind us of moments in history.

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture S1 - "Playful Design: Feast for the Eyes"
programme.sub-title: Playful Design: Feast for the Eyes
programme.desc: Buildings with eccentric and unorthodox designs often have methods behind their madness, and serve to remind us of moments in history.

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture S1 - "Theatres and Opera Houses: Unforgettable Experiences"
programme.sub-title: Theatres and Opera Houses: Unforgettable Experiences
programme.desc: Theaters and opera houses are wonders of stage technology, as well as exquisite masterpieces of modern or historic architecture.

programme.title: Made in Britain S1 - "Lea and Perrins Worcestershire Sauce and Soreen's Malt Loaf"
programme.sub-title: Lea and Perrins Worcestershire Sauce and Soreen's Malt Loaf
programme.desc: Exploring the historic Lea & Perrins factory, Lord Prescott uncovers the story behind its legendary Worcestershire sauce, made since 1837. He then heads to Manchester to the Soreen factory, home of the beloved malt loaf, where he joins the production line and experiments with creating a new flavour.

programme.title: Made in Britain S1 - "Ambrosia's desserts and Young's battered fish"
programme.sub-title: Ambrosia's desserts and Young's battered fish
programme.desc: To discover how his favourite meal—fish supper followed by rice pudding—is made, Lord Prescott visits the Ambrosia factory in Devon to explore the production of classic British desserts. Returning north to Grimsby, he heads to the Young's factory to learn about their famous fish pie.

programme.title: Made in Britain S1 - "Typhoo Tea and Fox's biscuits"
programme.desc: In search of the classic British pairing, tea and biscuits, Lord Prescott travels to Liverpool to visit the Typhoo tea factory, discovering the key to a perfectly brewed cup. Back in Yorkshire, he stops by the Fox’s biscuits factory, rounding off his journey with a truly British treat.

programme.title: Made in Britain S1 - "Ribena and Tyrells"
programme.desc: Taking a nostalgic journey to rediscover two of his childhood favourites, Lord Prescott visits the Ribena factory to see how their famous blackcurrant squash is made, using 90% of the UK's blackcurrant crop. In Herefordshire, he explores the Tyrrells crisp factory to learn how a small farm-based business turns homegrown potatoes into gourmet crisps.

programme.title: How Things Work S1 - "Chainsaws, Jukeboxes, and Fishing Reels"
programme.desc: Chainsaw, jukebox, fishing reel, car wash, blender and bicycle pump... Using ultra realistic CGI animation, we explode everyday objects into their component parts, to reveal their secret workings.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Impossible Ice"
programme.desc: A family in Saskatchewan call in a team of ice road truckers to haul their 3-storey wooden home across a frozen lake.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Supersize Station"
programme.desc: A family in Saskatchewan calls in a crew of house haulers to move an ornate railway station across the state so they can transform it into a dream home.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Pacific Palace"
programme.desc: A family in Vancouver calls in a crew of house truckers to haul a beautiful two-storey house across land and water so they can have a bigger home.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Harbour House"
programme.desc: A couple in Vancouver call in a crew of marine engineers to build and sail a beautiful floating house down the Fraser River and out to sea, to get to their moorings.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Floating Fortress"
programme.desc: A family hires a team of marine engineers in Vancouver to build and sail an enormous floating home down a busy river to reach their moorings.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "River Rescue"
programme.desc: A family in Washington state hires a crew of house truckers to rescue their beloved home that is about to fall off the edge of a crumbling cliff into a raging river.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Minnesota Family Farmhouse"
programme.desc: A family in Minnesota hire a team of house truckers to move their historic farmstead closer to work to eliminate their daily commutes.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Million Dollar Mansion"
programme.desc: The Pilcher family in Saskatchewan call in a team of house truckers to haul their stunning mansion across rough fields and down narrow lanes to save it from being demolished.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Hawaii House Chop"
programme.desc: A team of house truckers in Hawaii move a stunning house to a new plot of land for an entrepreneur in Honolulu.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Runway Race"
programme.desc: A family in St Cloud, Minnesota call in a team of house movers to move a beautiful two-storey home, destined to be their son’s first home, to rescue it from the wrecking ball.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Colossal Cabin"
programme.desc: A family in Greenville, Florida calls in a team of house haulers to move their much-loved holiday log cabin along a treacherous route to a new site.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Risky Rescue"
programme.desc: A family in Silex, Missouri call in a team of heavy haulers to rescue their treasured home from a waterlogged flood plain.

programme.title: Massive Moves S1 - "Historic House"
programme.desc: A family in Calgary call in a team of house truckers to move a historic colonial house to help give them – and their five children – more living space.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "History of the Roller Skate"
programme.desc: Take a ride through the history of the roller skate, explore the ancient art of baking, and find out more about the versatile Bamboo plant and it’s many uses’ from medicine to musical instruments.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "Chopsticks, Coffee and Coins"
programme.desc: Find our about chopsticks, coffee, coins, cooking and cotton, in this exciting episode that also explores the various Dinosaurs and what it’s like to feel and prepare for an Earthquake

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What do Karate, and Kick Boxing have in common?"
programme.sub-title: What do Karate, and Kick Boxing have in common?
programme.desc: Be more curious about the science of fossils and explore what’s on offer at the modern and popular gyms. What exactly is Induction Cooking and what do Karate, and Kick Boxing have in common?

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What is the Moon made of?"
programme.sub-title: What is the Moon made of?
programme.desc: What is milk? What is the Moon made of? How are Pencil’s made? Plus Roller Coasters, Rulers, Sail Boats, Snakes and more in this episode of More Curious

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "Eerie sounds of a Violin"
programme.desc: Find out more about yacht’s, the seasons and sushi, plus explore the martial art of Taekwondo. Take a look at the devastation left in the wake of a Tsunami, and the playful and eerie sounds of a Violin.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "World’s Most Used Medications"
programme.desc: Ultimate is a game more commonly known as Frisbee, we’ll take a look at one of the world’s most used medications, Asprin as well as the Cello, Tattoo’s, Tea, Thanksgiving and Recycling.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "3D Printing Technology and Cloud Storage"
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into 3D Printing technology and Cloud Storage. Discover all there is to know about Trains, Mammals, what is an aerosol spray plus signs ad treatments of the Common Cold

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What Makes a Storm?"
programme.desc: Take a look at the many woodwind instruments, explore the benefits of tablet computers, plus find out what makes a storm! We cover the history of speakers, rubbing alcohol and find out about the planets.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What are the many functions of our Nose?"
programme.sub-title: What are the many functions of our Nose?
programme.desc: Bass describes musical instruments with a low or deep frequency, passports are essential for global travel and what are the many functions of our Nose? Other topics covered include Blood pressure, Cinema, Pop and Comics.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What are blades?"
programme.desc: What is asphalt and how is it used? What are blades? Discover dishwashers and Irons and explore Greek mythology. Plus many more questions answered in this episode of More Curious.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "From Blenders to Boomerangs"
programme.desc: From blenders to boomerangs, air fryers to mummies, learn about the in’s and out’s of these items and topics plus an in depth look at e - sports covered in this episode.

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "What are acoustics?"
programme.desc: This episode answers the big questions. What are acoustics? How can you learn to code? What are fiber optics, and how effective are herbal medicines? Plus much more!

programme.title: More Curious? S1 - "Memory, Mining and Soil"
programme.desc: Explore the many knots and when to use them. Take a look at mixed martial arts, find out what a satellite is, and discover more about your memory, mining and soil.
